body:
Successor to #302, which is closed with its mathematics complete. This issue tracks the two remaining **engineering/assembly** items (no open mathematics in either).

## 1. The Johnson endgame: per-(Î´, u) cell production

The complete formal chain is in-tree and axiom-clean:

```
[THIS ISSUE] cell decomposition (Index, Ecell, Pcell, cover, count â‰¤ L, per-Î³ McaDecode)
   + per-large-cell Â§5 package (hHyp, surface w + hdvd, matchingSets, fold readings, numerics)
â†’ exists_pinning_pair_of_heavy_agreement     (Claim510CellPinning â€” LANDED)
â†’ hsteps57_of_decode_family_pinning          (MCAConjecturePairReduction â€” LANDED)
â†’ mca_johnson_bound_CONJECTURE_pair_of_decode_family_pinning  (LANDED)
â†’ mca_johnson_bound_CONJECTURE               (the #302 headline target)
```
equivalently through `johnsonNumericBound_of_claim1_cells` (Hab25CellWiring â€” LANDED, single input = the same capture).

The production = the S10-converse/Claim-5.7 assembly (`S10ToBundlePair.exists_bundle_pair_of_S10_converse` is the active partial; `FactorAssignmentPigeonhole`, `GSPerScalarCapture`, `Hab25HeavyPoints`, `exists_rich_coordinates` are the landed feeders). Sliced separability producers: `MappedSliceSeparabilityOn` (both lanes of the grand composition now take the sliced form). The hlin gate consumed en route is fully discharged: `natDegree_eq_one_of_decoded_fold_sliced` (no trivariate separability, no Î›-recursion, Ï€_z(Î¾)â‰ 0 free for monic).

## 2. The WHIR protocol stack (three stages, in order)

Machine-checked fences pin the current placeholders: `whirCheckingBool_allZero` (the checked verifier never reads the input oracle) and the honest-prover-is-zero finding (`msgAns_whirMakeTranscript = 0`). Therefore:
- (i) **genuine-fold prover** (real sumcheck payloads of the actual fold; mirror `stirMultiRoundProver`'s `Combine.combine` pattern);
- (ii) **input-binding checked verifier** (current chain checks âˆ§ input-vs-gâ‚€ at the folding challenge);
- (iii) **door-die soundness port** (template complete in `Stir/SubUnitRbr.lean`; SZ salvage cores `whir_salvage_*` landed; combinator = `FullPredKSF.rbrKnowledgeSoundness_of_salvageBound`).

Shared infra wanted by both fences' budget corollaries: the rbrâ†’soundness union-bound **probability lift** (the deterministic core landed: `KnowledgeStateFunction.exists_challenge_flip_of_full`; remaining = prefix-marginalization of `Prover.run` against the per-round games + budget sum; tools: `run_eq_runToRound_last`, `ContinueFromToSupport`).
title: WHIR Johnson endgame: per-cell Â§5 production + the genuine protocol stack (successor to #302)
